title: 雫拔刀剑
description: A SlashBlade mod contains multiple powerful katanas, including one exceptionally strong blade, another that plays sound effects when releasing its SA skill, and yet another capable of instantly killing most powerful bosses.
body:
![主要的拔刀剑](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8288423ed23c4e6fbebf73023e9e433df0afc6f.png)![拔刀剑的一个简介](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d81b49a1d02dc49e4e6446f0c6b4a6f0f7c7cbd.png)一款拔刀剑重锋的附属模组里面有强力的拔刀剑及sa与se，最强的sa甚至可以击败创造(在1.0或1.0.1, 1.0.2版本中)
An addon mod for SlashBlade: Resharped features powerful blades, Special Attacks (SA), and Special Effects (SE), with the strongest SA capable of defeating players even in Creative mode.​
1.​​1. Shizuku Blade​​
"Shizuku Blade, a katana with a stunning appearance and powerful SA skill, significantly enhances your combat capabilities."
2.The second blade emits audible sound effects when activating its SA skill, enhancing gameplay immersion for all players.
3.The 'Famous' blade instantly kills most powerful bosses, including creative-mode players wearing top-tier gear

伤害公式：

最终伤害 = (面板攻击力 + 横扫之刃附魔 + 锋利附魔 + 力量附魔 + 精炼数加成 + 耀魂值加成 + 杀手类附魔)
           × 连招伤害系数 × 拔刀剑伤害调整比例 × 拔刀伤害系数

           Final damage = (Panel attack power + Sweeping Blade spell + Sharpness spell + Strength spell + Refinement bonus + Soul Spark bonus + Assassin-type spells) × Combo damage multiplier × Sword-drawing attack damage adjustment factor × Sword-drawing attack damage multiplier.
 内含多种强力sa,和多种强力的拔刀剑具有多样化和创新，优美的刀身和炫酷的外表及有力的技能，可以保证你游玩的体验，爽快的体验
 This mod features a variety of powerful Special Attacks (SA) and formidable blades, characterized by their diversity, innovative design, elegant blades, and stylish appearances. Its potent skills ensure a thrilling and satisfying gameplay experience.
我的最强拔刀剑绝对能做到十分强的地位会更新，目前已经可以击败我所知的最强boss了（有清除实体等多种方式），并且还有开启强力模式的快捷键。若有无法击败的boss请给我反馈
My ultimate SlashBlade absolutely guarantees a top-tier status and will receive continuous updates. At present, it is already capable of defeating the most powerful bosses I know (through mechanics such as entity clearance), and features a dedicated hotkey to activate Power Mode。If there exists any boss that cannot be defeated, please provide feedback.
